description: A recent telemetry sync failure caused several Flight Logs to be saved without being linked to their approved Flight Plans. Reconcile these orphaned records by linking FlightLogs where flight_plan is NULL to the appropriate FlightPlan. A match occurs when the Aircraft is the same and the Log's 'created_at' time falls strictly between the Plan's 'start_time' and 'end_time'. For any FlightLog that cannot be matched to a valid plan, append its ID to a report file at /home/ga/Documents/unmatched_logs.txt.
